## Constraints

Things design must respect, not things to solve.

- **Timeline:** {{hard dates, events, launch tie-ins}}
- **Budget:** {{fixed / hourly / retainer}}
- **Technical:** {{must stay on WordPress / Shopify / Webflow / custom}}
- **Brand:** {{logo is locked / brand refresh also in progress / full creative freedom}}
- **Stakeholders:** {{who signs off, who can kill it}}
